Course

University Requirements for Graduation: □ Must earn a minimum of 120 credits to complete a degree.

At least 30 credits must be earned at UMD 15 of the ﬁnal 30 credits must be earned at the 300-400 level 12 upper level major credits must be earned at UMD

□ □ □ ARCH Requirements for Graduation At least 45 upper level credits □ □ UNIV100 or equivalent (if applicable)
